name: Clue Vacuuming Rex|Core+Dunwich+Edge|Beginner Deck Guide
description_md:
# **Rex is often considered the best clue-getter in the game. Let me show you why.** `Please don't forget to press the ♥ if you like the Deck and the work that has been put into making it :)` > This deck only uses the Revised Core Set / 2 Core Sets, The Dunwich Legacy (TDL) Investigator Expansion, and the Edge of the Earth (EotE) Investigator Expansion. [![Cristi-B-Rex-Murphy.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/QtS3sDFQ/Cristi-B-Rex-Murphy.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/Fdfqg2gz) Credit: Cristi Balanescu ___
**
Introduction:
** This deck displays the sheer strength of one of the investigators still considered today as one of the best cluever of the game. _Even if you are new to the game, I personally encourage you to play with the Taboo, meaning Milan and Rex's only once per turn, as it is enough to get silly results. Even like this, these 2 fellas are the best 'gator/ally in the world._ ___ This Deck is part of a series of Decks created for the release of the Revised The Dunwich Legacy Campaign. Find the other Beginner Deck Guides for the other investigators here: *  [BruiZ-oey](https://arkhamdb.com/decklist/view/36478/bruiz-oey-monster-cook-revised-tdl-eote-beginner-deck-guide-1.0) * [Mo-Jenny Rules the World](https://arkhamdb.com/decklist/view/36548/mo-jenny-rules-the-world-revised-eote-tdl-beginner-deck-guid-1.0) *  [True Ma-Jim](https://arkhamdb.com/decklist/view/36513/true-ma-jim-revised-tdl-eote-beginner-deck-guide-1.0) *  [Pete and the Underdog](https://arkhamdb.com/decklist/view/36538/pete-and-the-underdog-revised-tdl-eote-beginner-deck-guide-1.0) If you liked these Decks, please try the Carcosa Beginner Deck Series: * [Mythos Busting Mark](https://arkhamdb.com/decklist/view/37361/mythos-busting-mark-beginner-deck-guide-series-1.0) * [Scavenge-Minhg](https://arkhamdb.com/decklist/view/37360/scavenge-minhg-beginner-deck-guide-series-1.0) * [Sefine-Art Black Magic Painter](https://arkhamdb.com/decklist/view/37359/sefine-art-black-magic-painter-beginner-deck-guide-series-1.0) * [Akachi Ony-Elemental Mage](https://arkhamdb.com/decklist/view/37358/akachi-ony-elemental-mage-beginner-deck-guide-series-1.0) * [Yorick Gold Digger](https://arkhamdb.com/decklist/view/37357/yorick-gold-digger-beginner-deck-guide-series-1.0) _If you do not own The Edge of the Earth, an alternative only using the Revised Core and The Dunwich Legacy is available at the bottom in "Make your own Deck!"_ ___
**
Table of Content:
** • Overview • Main Strategy • Investigating • Scavenging • Upgrade Path • Make your own Deck! ___
**
Overview:
** || | |-|-| |Difficulty:||★★☆☆☆ | Enemy Management:||★★☆☆☆ | Clue-getting:||★★★★★ | Encounter protection:||★★★☆☆ | Survivability:||★★☆☆☆ | Economy:||★★★★☆ | Card Drawing:||★★★☆☆ ___
**
Main Strategy:
** Try to get the benefit from Rex every turn to get an extra clue and gain tempo to improve your chances of winning the game. If there is an uneven amount of clues at your location, make use of [Burglary](/card/01045) or [Seeking Answers](/card/01685) to get the benefit and get the clue at your location still. ___
**
Investigating:
** To make sure that you succeed by 2 or more at least once per turn, we are going to boost your . With a [Magnifying Glasses](/card/01030) and [Dr. Milan Christopher](/card/01033) on the table, you are now investigating with a base of 6 . Use a Supply from your [Flashlight](/card/01087) and you are now at a virtual score of 8 ! For higher shroud locations, you can also commit some of your events to make sure that you always overcommit by at least 3. **If there is 1 clue at your location:** Use [Burglary](/card/01045) on your location. If you succeed by 2 or more, you will get 3 resources and the clue at your location. Use [Seeking Answers](/card/01685) on a connecting location. If you succeed by 2 or more, you will get a clue at the connecting location and one at yours. **If there are 2 clues at your location:** You can do a basic _**Investigate._** Action and hope to trigger your . Use your [Flashlight](/card/01087) to increase your chances. You can also use [Seeking Answers](/card/01685)/[Burglary](/card/01045) and commit [Deduction](/card/01039) to find 2 clues at your location in case of success by 2 or more, and one clue at a connecting location. **If there are 3 clues or more at your location:** This is where you really shine, to get a lot of clues at one location, fast. Early campaign, commit [Deduction](/card/01039), use your . Later in the campaign, you'll be able also to use your [Deduction (2)](/card/02150), [Ice Picks (3)](/card/08107), [Divination (4)](/card/08103) to empty locations at an unbeatable speed. ___
**
Scavenging:
** You can probably notice that there is 2 copies of [Scavenging](/card/01073) and not many targets besides the Flashlights. This is because your first upgrade is [Ice Picks (3)](/card/08107), which you can then recycle every time you succeed by 2 or more for an extra clue! `Note:` You cannot scavenge the [Ice Pick (3)](/card/08107) at the same action as you throw it, so you need 2 of them: • Play [Ice Pick](/card/08107) A • **Investigate.** If you succeed, use the ability of the [Ice Pick](/card/08105) A and discard it to get an extra clue. • If you succeeded by 2 or more, you can _Scavenge_ [Ice Pick](/card/08107) B, which is in your discard pile. • Play [Ice Pick](/card/08107) B • **Investigate.** If you succeed, use the ability of the [Ice Pick](/card/08105) B and discard it to get an extra clue. • If you succeeded by 2 or more, you scavenge [Ice Pick](/card/08107) A, which is in your discard pile. •• As [Scavenging](/card/01073) exhausts, you can only do this twice per turn, but that's already sick. As every [Ice Pick (3)](/card/08107) costs 1 resource, we add [Crafty](/card/08123) to our priority upgrades to pay for them. It turns out that it also pays for _Insights_, which is terrific because it's our main Event Trait. ___
**
Other Cards:
** • ["I've got a plan!"](/card/02107): even though you will have a Damage Dealer by your side, sometimes it's good to be able to handle yourself for a little while. • [Preposterous Sketches](/card/02186) is here because [Crafty](/card/08123) will pay for it, and unfortunately, at this stage, it's your only Draw engine (besides your Signature [Search for the Truth](/card/02008)). Note that you do not want to Draw too often as it would mean that you also see your Weakness more often... • [Shortcut](/card/02022): You empty locations so fast that you may easily spend half of your actions moving, and it is that many lost actions. [Shortcut](/card/02022) is a cheap, and flexible way of moving around the board faster. • [Ward of Protection](/card/01065) is always excellent if it prevents you from putting a Doom on the Agenda or protects you from some nasty Treachery Cards, and you have enough Sanity to pay for it. • The Skill Suite (except for [Overpower](/card/01091)) is here to save you from Tests you could have on Encounter Cards or help during some Scenario Tests like Parley. • [Hyperawareness](/card/01034) is a great way to spend your overflow of cash to either flee an enemy or succeed a hard test. ___
**
Upgrade Path:
** [Link to the 33xp Deck](https://arkhamdb.com/deck/view/2036948) • [Magnifying Glass](/card/01030) x2 [Ice Pick (3)](/card/08107) x2 - 6xp - Total 6xp •• [Ice Pick](/card/08107) boosts your the same as the [Magnifying Glass](/card/01030) except that it can also be discarded for an extra clue, and _Scavenged_ back! • [Seeking Answers](/card/01685) [Crafty](/card/08123) x2 - 6xp - Total 12xp •• [Crafty](/card/08123) will pay for your [Ice Picks](/card/08107), your [Flashlights](/card/01087), and most of your events, saving you some actions and resources! • [Guts](/card/01089) x2 [Divination (4)](/card/08103) x2 - 8xp - Total 20xp •• The acceleration power of [Divination](/card/08103) is insane, 3 clues in one action, 4 with your ... • [Manual Dexterity](/card/01092) x2 [Unearth the Ancients (2)](/card/08039) x2 - 4xp - Total 24xp •• With all these new _Assets_, the Deck can become a bit slow. [Unearth the Ancients (2)](/card/08039) allow you to get a clue (or 2 with your ) while playing some assets. • [Hyperawareness](/card/01034) x1 [Hiking Boots](/card/08035) x1 - 1xp - Total 25xp •• As you empty locations at the speed of light, you will get a lot of free moves from these, as well as a nice boost for Encounter Tests. • [Shortcut](/card/02022) x2 [Join the Caravan](/card/08036) x2 - 2xp - Total 27xp •• A bit of a luxury update, but it takes you further and faster, so why not! • [Inquiring Mind](/card/02227) x2 [Eon Chart (1)](/card/08098) x2 - 2xp - Total 29 •• As investigating and moving is everything you do, why not a bit more of it? 2 resources against 2 actions is an excellent ratio. • [Deduction](/card/01039) x2 [Deduction (2)](/card/02150) x2 - 4xp - Total 33xp •• You can upgrade this one at any point, but Rex is so good already that it's not a priority. ___
**
Make your own Deck!:
** • If you do not have The Edge of the Earth Investigator Box, you can look at [this Deck](https://arkhamdb.com/deck/view/2038719), that only uses the Revised Core Set and Dunwich. ___ • If you are playing this Deck with only 1 collection and multiple of my pre-made Decks: [BruiZ-oey](https://arkhamdb.com/decklist/view/36478/bruiz-oey-monster-cook-revised-tdl-eote-beginner-deck-guide-1.0), [Clue Vacuuming Rex](https://arkhamdb.com/decklist/view/36402/clue-vacuuming-rex-revised-eote-tdl-beginner-deck-guide-1.0), [True Ma-Jim](https://arkhamdb.com/decklist/view/36513/true-ma-jim-revised-tdl-eote-beginner-deck-guide-1.0) or [Pete and the Underdog](https://arkhamdb.com/decklist/view/36538/pete-and-the-underdog-revised-tdl-eote-beginner-deck-guide-1.0), you can distribute the cards as follow: •• Give [Dr. Milan Christopher](/card/01033), [Magnifying Glass](/card/01030) to [Rex Murphy](/card/02002) •• Give [Scavenging](/card/01073) and [Ice Pick (3)](/card/08107) to ["Ashcan" Pete](/card/02005). •• Give 1 copy of [Prepared for the Worst](/card/02184) to ["Ashcan" Pete](/card/02005) and [Jenny Barnes](/card/02003) as [Zoey Samaras](/card/02001) already has 4 weapons. •• Give 1 copy of [Jury-Rig](/card/08074) to [Jim Culver](/card/02004) and 1 to ["Ashcan" Pete](/card/02005). •• Give 1 [Ward of Protection](/card/01065) to [Rex Murphy](/card/02002) and 1 to [Jim Culver](/card/02004). •• Give 2 [Scout Ahead](/card/08047) to [Zoey Samaras](/card/02001) and upgrade [Jenny Barnes](/card/02003) with [The Red Clock](/card/08053) earlier. •• Give 2 [Bruiser](/card/08122) to ["Ashcan" Pete](/card/02005) and go for the [Cyclopean Hammer](/card/08093) for [Zoey Samaras](/card/02001). •• Give [Divination](/card/08101) to [Jim Culver](/card/02004).
